metadata.name: Handle Arrival on Incorrect Check-in Date

description: A guest arrives to check in, but their reservation is for the following day.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's reservation and confirm the check-in date is for tomorrow.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the reservation and the date discrepancy.

nodes.task_description: Check for room availability for the current night.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that a room of the same type is available for tonight.

nodes.task_description: Modify the reservation to start today and inform the guest of the additional charge for the extra night.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully modifies the booking and checks the guest in.
